PART name=sprocket_520_22t_test

PLATE width=140 height=140 thickness=6

PROFILE outer

LINE x1=0.000 y1=62.000 x2=-7.614 y2=52.955
LINE x1=-7.614 y1=52.955 x2=-17.467 y2=59.489
LINE x1=-17.467 y1=59.489 x2=-22.225 y2=48.665

END_PROFILE

SKETCH operation=cut

CIRCLE x=0 y=0 diameter=30

END_SKETCH

SAVE name=sprocket_520_22t_test
